title: Pornography and Its Association with Sexual Aggression Among Adolescents and Adults
journal: Annals of the International Communication Association
key_finding: Meta-analysis of 22 studies found significant positive associations between pornography consumption and sexual aggression, both verbally and physically.

title: Is Internet Pornography Causing Sexual Dysfunctions? A Review with Clinical Reports
key_finding: Reviewed evidence suggesting escalating internet pornography use is associated with sexual dysfunction, particularly in younger men, including diminished arousal and erectile dysfunction.

title: Pornography Use and Relationship Satisfaction: A Meta-Analytic Review
key_finding: Meta-analysis found consistent negative associations between pornography use and relationship satisfaction, sexual satisfaction, and commitment across multiple studies.

title: Problematic Pornography Use from the Perspective of Addictive Disorders
key_finding: Brain imaging studies of individuals with compulsive pornography use showed neural patterns similar to substance use disorders, particularly involving dopaminergic reward pathways.

title: Adolescents and Web Pornography: Experience and Parental Mediation
key_finding: 93% of male participants and 62% of female participants were exposed to internet pornography before age 18, with many first exposures occurring accidentally.

title: Online Pornography Viewing and Sexual Satisfaction: A Cross-National Study
key_finding: Cross-national data demonstrated that frequent pornography use was associated with decreased sexual satisfaction with real-world partners across multiple countries.

title: Compulsive Sexual Behavior as a Behavioral Addiction: The Impact of the Internet and Other Issues
key_finding: Growing evidence supports classifying compulsive sexual behavior, including excessive pornography use, as a behavioral addiction with neurobiological similarities to substance addiction.

title: Exposure to Sexually Explicit Web Sites and Adolescent Sexual Attitudes and Behaviors
key_finding: Adolescent exposure to sexually explicit online material was associated with more permissive sexual attitudes and uncertainty about sexual norms, affecting developmental trajectories.

title: How Pornography Harms Children: The Advocate's Role
key_finding: Analysis of best-selling adult content found that 88.2% of scenes contained physical aggression and 48.7% contained verbal aggression, almost always directed toward women.

title: The Relationship Between Pornography Use and Sexual Coercion in Heterosexual Couples
key_finding: Greater pornography use among male partners was associated with higher rates of sexual coercion within heterosexual relationships, with desensitization as a mediating factor.

title: Depression, Shame, and Ruminative Thought as Mediators of the Link Between Religiosity and Pornography Use
key_finding: Perceived addiction to pornography — regardless of actual usage levels — was significantly associated with depression and shame, suggesting psychological harm beyond behavioral patterns.

title: Age Verification for Online Pornography: Policy Approaches and Implications
key_finding: Current age verification mechanisms on most explicit content platforms are inadequate, with self-declaration of age being the most common — and least effective — method of verification.
